# LinkedIn Ads Benchmarks 2026: CPC, CTR, CVR by Industry

## Summary
Digital Applied publishes cross-industry benchmark data for LinkedIn Ads 2026. The report covers CPC ($5.74 average, up 9% YoY), CPM ($33.80), Lead Gen Form CVR (6.1%, 5x landing page CVR), and CPL by industry (cross-industry $94). A key finding is that Lead Gen Forms are now the default conversion surface with dramatically lower drop-off (28% vs 65% off-platform).

## Key quotations / statistics
- Cross-industry average CPC: **$5.74** (up 9% YoY from $5.26 in 2024)
- Cross-industry average CPM: **$33.80**
- Cross-industry average CPL: **$94** (up from $87 in 2025)
- Lead Gen Form CVR: **6.1%** (vs 1.6% for off-platform landing pages)
- Lead Gen Form drop-off: **28%** (vs 65% for off-platform)
- "Lead Gen Forms are now the default conversion surface for B2B campaigns. The 6.1% average CVR (vs. 1.2-2.4% on off-platform landing pages) and 28% drop-off rate make them economically dominant."
- B2B SaaS Lead Gen Form CVR: **8.2%** (highest industry vertical along with IT/cybersecurity 7.8%)
- "ABM campaigns also produce 38% lower CPLs than broad targeting once the audience reaches statistical maturity."
- "LinkedIn CPLs run 1.8-2.3x higher than Google Search for equivalent B2B intent."

### CPL by industry (2026)
| Industry | Avg CPL | YoY Change |
|---|---|---|
| Financial Services | $148 | +9% |
| IT Services | $103 | +10% |
| Management Consulting | $98 | +8% |
| Professional Services | $97 | +9% |
| Media & Publishing | $64 | +5% |
| Cross-Industry Average | $94 | +8% |

### CPL by region (2026)
| Region | Avg CPC | Avg CPL | Lead Gen Form CVR |
|---|---|---|---|
| United States | $6.41 | $104 | 5.9% |

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- This is the **primary source for CPL benchmark table** in `guides/01-channel-fit-diagnosis.md` and `guides/02-linkedin-ads.md`
- Lead Gen Form CVR of 6.1% vs 1.6% landing page is a key decision point for campaign architecture - stinger-forge should make this recommendation explicit
- The 9% YoY CPC increase signals cost inflation; the minimum viable budget numbers in `guides/00-principles.md` should use conservative estimates
- Industry-specific CPL table should be reproduced (with attribution) in `guides/02-linkedin-ads.md`
